message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All done, shutting down team">
All work complete. Great session — the Driver-Reviewer model worked well, zero concurrent edit conflicts. The consensus-before-push pipeline is now codified. Shutting down the team. Thank you all.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Good session. The Driver-Reviewer model eliminated the concurrent edit chaos we had before -- that alone was worth the change. All five tasks shipped clean.

Quick UX summary of what we delivered today:
- Password toggle that's invisible plumbing (Task #1)
- CSS that supports clear visual hierarchy throughout (Task #2)
- Focus management so users never get lost after deletions (Task #3)
- Smooth empty state transitions in both directions (Task #4)
- Frictionless inline editing with solid no-JS fallback (Task #5)

The app doesn't make the user think. That's the goal. Ready to shut down.
input.summary: Session summary, ready to shut down

routing.summary: Session summary, ready to shut down

content.text: Session complete. All five tasks reviewed and consented to. Ready for shutdown whenever the team lead sends the request.
